problem: [BUG] cache_breakpoint injected into messages for non-Anthropic providers (Groq, OpenAI-compatible). mark_cache_breakpoint() is called on all messages in agent_executor.py regardless of provider. Only the Anthropic adapter translates/strips this flag. All other providers (Groq, OpenAI-compatible, etc.) receive `cache_breakpoint: true` in the raw message dict, which their APIs reject. (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
